creator: draco@marino.st
text:
This update must occur after Mk/Uses/ada.mk is committed.
http://leaf.dragonflybsd.org/~marino/ada/ada.mk

gtkada was updated to respect USES+= ada rather than hard-code a dependency on the (older) lang/gnat-aux.  Additionally:
1) A pre-generated reference manual has been added as a second distfile and is installed
2) License added
3) DESTDIR support added (comes from pkgsrc)
4) gcc 4.7-specific patches
5) PLIST order alphabetically and fix issues with it.

Fix: 

The patch is over 100K due the large PLIST
It has be retrieved here:
http://leaf.dragonflybsd.org/~marino/ada/gtkada.diff
